actions.value:
Edge has streamlined a solution for these cases. We're calling the 'Split Wallet' feature, and here is an example of recovering ETH funds sent along the Ethereum main network, into a Fantom (ETH) wallet address in Edge:

  1. Locate the receiving wallet with the address that matches where the funds were sent - "Mis Fantom" in this case
  2. Tap into this parent wallet, then on the three vertical dots (⋮) to access this wallet's menu.
  3. Find the option to 'Split'
  4. Now select the network or blockchain that funds were sent on (ETH main network). 

This will create a new wallet with the same address, on the appropriate network where you will see your funds!

Please let us know if you have any more questions on this.
